doctrine: A product exists when a stranger can name it, see a price, and reach a checkout. Anything less is an artifact.

products.name: Epic Fury 2026
products.what_it_is: Conflict-intelligence platform. Live OSINT feeds AND the Operation Epic Fury simulated scenario, with every dashboard labelled LIVE / SIMULATION / MIXED so an analyst never has to guess which they are reading.
products.buyer: Geopolitical/defense analysts, risk desks, journalists, wargamers
